'''ngothakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kleptoplastic|kleptoplastic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kleptoplastic|kleptoplastic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngothakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothakithi|ngothakithi]] || [[word:ngothakiji|ngothakiji]] || [[word:ngothakishi|ngothakishi]] || [[word:ngothakiki|ngothakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothakuthuthu|ngothakuthuthu]] || [[word:ngothakujuju|ngothakujuju]] || [[word:ngothakushushu|ngothakushushu]] || [[word:ngothakukuku|ngothakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothakuthu|ngothakuthu]] || [[word:ngothakuju|ngothakuju]] || [[word:ngothakushu|ngothakushu]] || [[word:ngothakuku|ngothakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothakufthuf|ngothakufthuf]] || [[word:ngothakufjuf|ngothakufjuf]] || [[word:ngothakufshuf|ngothakufshuf]] || [[word:ngothakufkuf|ngothakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothakethe|ngothakethe]] || [[word:ngothakeje|ngothakeje]] || [[word:ngothakeshe|ngothakeshe]] || [[word:ngothakeke|ngothakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothakothotho|ngothakothotho]] || [[word:ngothakojojo|ngothakojojo]] || [[word:ngothakoshosho|ngothakoshosho]] || [[word:ngothakokoko|ngothakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothakotho|ngothakotho]] || [[word:ngothakojo|ngothakojo]] || [[word:ngothakosho|ngothakosho]] || [[word:ngothakoko|ngothakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothakofthof|ngothakofthof]] || [[word:ngothakofjof|ngothakofjof]] || [[word:ngothakofshof|ngothakofshof]] || [[word:ngothakofkof|ngothakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf|ngothakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngothakĂŠthĂŠ|ngothakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothakĂŠjĂŠ|ngothakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothakĂŠshĂŠ|ngothakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngothakĂŠkĂŠ|ngothakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngothakathatha|ngothakathatha]] || [[word:ngothakajaja|ngothakajaja]] || [[word:ngothakashasha|ngothakashasha]] || [[word:ngothakakaka|ngothakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngothakatha|ngothakatha]] || [[word:ngothakaja|ngothakaja]] || [[word:ngothakasha|ngothakasha]] || [[word:ngothakaka|ngothakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngothakafthaf|ngothakafthaf]] || [[word:ngothakafjaf|ngothakafjaf]] || [[word:ngothakafshaf|ngothakafshaf]] || [[word:ngothakafkaf|ngothakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngothakasha|ngothakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothakshĂ«sha|ngothakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothakrosha|ngothakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothakmusha|ngothakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothakyasha|ngothakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothaknkshĂ«sha|gongothaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothaknkrosha|gongothaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothaknkmusha|gongothaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothaknkyasha|gongothaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngothathakasha|ngothathakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothathakshĂ«sha|ngothathakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothathakrosha|ngothathakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothathakmusha|ngothathakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothathakyasha|ngothathakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothathaknkshĂ«sha|gongothathaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothathaknkrosha|gongothathaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothathaknkmusha|gongothathaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothathaknkyasha|gongothathaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngethĂŠkasha|ngethĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngethĂŠkshĂ«sha|ngethĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngethĂŠkrosha|ngethĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngethĂŠkmusha|ngethĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngethĂŠkyasha|ngethĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongethĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gongethĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongethĂŠknkrosha|gongethĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongethĂŠknkmusha|gongethĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongethĂŠknkyasha|gongethĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngothfakasha|ngothfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngothfakshĂ«sha|ngothfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngothfakrosha|ngothfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngothfakmusha|ngothfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngothfakyasha|ngothfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongothfaknkshĂ«sha|gongothfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongothfaknkrosha|gongothfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongothfaknkmusha|gongothfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongothfaknkyasha|gongothfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
